issues.title: Bootstrap project-specific README and architecture docs
issues.summary: Create initial product-facing docs from planning baseline.
issues.problem: Implementation starts without a clear shared understanding of scope and architecture.
scope: Write project README with setup and workflow
Create SPEC.md with functional and non-functional requirements
Create ARCHITECTURE.md with components and data flow
acceptance_criteria: README.md, SPEC.md, and ARCHITECTURE.md exist and are internally consistent
Documents include references to make check and AGENTS workflow
how_to_verify: Review files for consistency and completeness

issues.title: Implement first feature slice from spec
issues.summary: Deliver the first user-visible feature slice based on approved spec.
issues.problem: No functional product behavior exists after planning baseline.
scope: Add tests that cover happy path and key failure path
acceptance_criteria: Feature behaves as defined in SPEC.md for initial use case
Tests pass in CI and locally with make check
how_to_verify: Execute documented feature verification steps from SPEC.md
